'''Galak''' was a volunteer [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] for the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]].

==Biography==
He was a native of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], and received some of his military training from [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Quarsh Panaka/Legends|Quarsh Panaka]] at the [[Royal House of Learning/Legends|Royal House of Learning]]. Prior to the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|invasion]], he and [[Arani Korden]], [[Rorworr (Naboo)|Rorworr]], and [[Rann I-Kanu]] were tasked by Rann's master to seek out a rumored group of [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] hiding in a base near [[Theed/Legends|Theed]]. One of Arani's contacts came up with the location of the group after a couple of days. There, they found a hidden smuggler's base led by [[Saidle Frex]]. They defeated Frex and his gang and rescued the abducted archaeology professor [[Tasrah Boh]] in the process. At the age of 15, he played a minor role as a member of the [[Naboo Underground]] in defending Naboo from Trade Federation forces in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].
